pi_items.source: Explicitly defined in setup_task.sh ARCHIVE_DIR and checked via setup_seiscomp.sh initialization scripts
Enforced directly by export_result.sh and verifier.py scoring logic
Verifier checks for 'station details' and 'summary' strings in the lower-case report content

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real GEOFON miniSEED waveform data for the 2024 Noto Peninsula earthquake. The SDS archive at /home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive contains exactly 3 files totaling 187,392 bytes from stations BKB, GSI, and SANI on channel BHZ for date 2024.001. The generated report at /home/ga/data_availability_report.txt must contain 'Station Details' and 'Summary' headers, accurately reflecting this file count, size, and the date range '2024.001-2024.001'.
